basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website of CMD Kerala. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CMD Kerala Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details. Age Relaxation: Please refer to the official notification for age relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech (Electrical & Electronics) & M.Tech in Power Systems Engineering, B.Tech (Electrical/CS) & M.Tech in Computer Science / Data Science/AI, B.Tech (Any Stream) & MBA in Finance
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Power Systems): B.Tech (Electrical & Electronics) & M.Tech in Power Systems Engineering Senior Research Fellow (Computer Science AI): B.Tech (Electrical/CS) & M.Tech in Computer Science / Data Science/AI Senior Research Fellow (Finance): B.Tech (Any Stream) & MBA in Finance

selection_process: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CMD Kerala Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CMD Kerala Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.centre_for_management_development_cmd_ke: B.Tech (Electrical & Electronics) & M.Tech in Power Systems Engineering, B.Tech (Electrical/CS) & M.Tech in Computer Science / Data Science/AI, B.Tech (Any Stream) & MBA in Finance

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CMD Kerala Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Research Fellow (Power Systems): B.Tech (Electrical & Electronics) & M.Tech in Power Systems Engineering Senior Research Fellow (Computer Science AI): B.Tech (Electrical/CS) & M.Tech in Computer Science / Data Science/AI Senior Research Fellow (Finance): B.Tech (Any Stream) & MBA in Finance

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details. Age Relaxation: Please refer to the official notification for age relaxation details.

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Kerala Sr. Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the CMD Kerala Sr. Research Fellow posts is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Sr. Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month. This is a fixed monthly remuneration for the contract period.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Sr. Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Sr. Research Fellow posts released by the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala). These vacancies are distributed across different specializations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CMD Kerala Sr. Research Fellow recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for the CMD Kerala recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the official notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Sr. Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by specialization. They include B.Tech & M.Tech in Power Systems Engineering, B.Tech & M.Tech in Computer Science/Data Science/AI, and B.Tech & MBA in Finance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Sr. Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves multiple stages, including application screening, criteria-based screening, a written test, group discussion, a skill/proficiency test, and a final interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Sr. Research Fellow are on a contract basis. This means the employment is for a fixed duration as specified by the organization.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of CMD Kerala?
faq.answer: The official website of the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) is www.cmd.kerala.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and updates regarding the recruitment.
